from urllib.request import Request, urlopen
import base64

Bash(python3 -c "
import json, base64
from urllib.request import Request, urlopen

url = 'https://masterly-api.the-nebula.tech/api/v1/internal/videos/3'
body = json.dumps\({'is_uploaded': True, 'duration': 60}\).encode\(\)
cred = base64.b64encode\(b'admin:password'\).decode\(\)
req = Request\(url, data=body, method='PATCH'\)
req.add_header\('Authorization', f'Basic {cred}'\)
req.add_header\('Content-Type', 'application/json'\)
req.add_header\('Accept', 'application/json'\)
print\(f'URL: {req.full_url}'\)
print\(f'Method: {req.method}'\)
print\(f'Headers: {dict\(req.headers\)}'\)
try:
    with urlopen\(req\) as resp:
        print\(f'Status: {resp.status}'\)
        print\(resp.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
except Exception as e:
    print\(f'Error: {e}'\)
    if hasattr\(e, 'read'\):
        print\(e.read\(\).decode\(\)\)
" 2>&1)
